_meta.description: Exemplo de prompt de imagem gerado pelo image-prompter para a marca Método Ticket Livre (Marina Souza). Hero image para sales page — formato quadrado 1:1. Cores injetadas diretamente de brands/exemplo-marina-design.md.
_meta.note: Arquivo fictício demonstrativo — não representa campanha real.

subject: Brazilian woman in her early 30s sitting confidently at a minimalist designer's desk, laptop open showing a branding project, a physical portfolio visible on the desk surface, direct eye contact with camera, subtle knowing expression — the look of someone who has figured something out
style: lifestyle photography, natural light, editorial clean, authentic candid, no overproduction
composition: rule of thirds, subject positioned in left two-thirds, right third shows clean desk context, medium shot from waist up, shallow depth of field with desk elements soft in background
lighting: soft natural window light from the left, warm golden tones, no harsh shadows on face, bright and inviting atmosphere
mood: professional yet approachable, quietly confident, aspirational, warm — the feeling of 'she knows what her work is worth'

colors.notes: Brand colors from brands/exemplo-marina-design.md — Preto suave (#1A1A1A), Off-white (#F5F3EF), Terracota (#C4714A), Cinza frio (#E8E8E8), Grafite (#3D3D3D). Warm neutral background and terracota accent visible in desk accessories or clothing detail.

negative_prompt: stock photo look, stiff pose, fake corporate smile, generic office background, fluorescent lighting, overly saturated colors, watermark, blurry, distorted hands, extra limbs, cluttered background

O problema não é o seu preço. É o que você está vendendo.
